name: NotPetya Global Destructive Attack

victim.description: Ukrainian government, banks, energy companies; global spillover to Maersk, FedEx, Merck, and others causing ~$10B in damages

infrastructure.description: Trojanized M.E.Doc tax software update used as initial vector in Ukraine; EternalBlue/Mimikatz for lateral movement

description: Sandworm deployed NotPetya via compromised Ukrainian accounting software M.E.Doc. Used EternalBlue and credential harvesting for rapid lateral movement. Wiper disguised as ransomware caused $10B+ in global damages.
